name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
bio: Raja Krishnamoorthi is a U.S. Representative from Illinois's 8th congressional district who filed for the 2026 Democratic U.S. Senate primary. He has served in Congress since 2017 and previously worked in state and federal policy roles. (Source: FEC S6IL00482; Shaw Local primary ballot guide, March 5, 2026)

jacket.note: Approximately $30M raised as of March 2026 per The Intercept and Chicago Business reporting. Detailed donor breakdown pending FEC ETL.

red_flags.label: AIPAC Endorsement + Pro-Israel Donor Network
red_flags.detail: AIPAC endorsed Krishnamoorthi for his 2024 House reelection. He has received over $250K from pro-Israel lobby groups over his career. AIPAC-aligned donors are active in his Senate campaign.

red_flags.label: Crypto Industry PAC Money (Fairshake)
red_flags.detail: Krishnamoorthi has accepted money from Fairshake, a crypto industry PAC that has spent heavily to influence congressional elections nationwide.

red_flags.label: Donors with MAGA / Trump ties
red_flags.detail: The Chicago Sun-Times reported in December 2025 that Krishnamoorthi accepted donations from Trump-aligned donors and political figures, including Shyam Sankar, CTO of Palantir — a company with ICE contracts.

key_votes.summary: Voted to provide additional military aid to Israel.

career_history.highlight: House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence; House Select Committee on China

policy_platform.position: Led House Select Committee on the Chinese Communist Party; authored legislation on TikTok national security review; hawkish on economic competition with China.
Supports antitrust enforcement against Big Tech; focused on AI governance and data privacy legislation.
Voted for additional military aid to Israel (2024). Has called for humanitarian pauses but stopped short of arms embargo. Backed by AIPAC-aligned donors.
Centrist Democrat; supports manufacturing reshoring, semiconductor investment (CHIPS Act), and workforce development.

social_pulse.summary: Mixed-to-negative among progressive primary voters due to AIPAC ties and Gaza votes. Positive mainstream press for China committee work. High name recognition statewide.

trust_indicators.label: Accepted donations from Trump-aligned donors (Palantir CTO)
No personal ethics violations on record
